# services.mtprotoproxy

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mtprotoproxy`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mtprotoproxy.adTag` | `null or string` | Tag for advertising that can be obtained from @MTProxybot. |
| `services.mtprotoproxy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable mtprotoproxy. |
| `services.mtprotoproxy.extraConfig` | `attribute set` | Extra configuration options for mtprotoproxy. |
| `services.mtprotoproxy.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port to accept mtproto connections on. |
| `services.mtprotoproxy.secureOnly` | `boolean` | Don't allow users to connect in non-secure mode (without random padding). |
| `services.mtprotoproxy.users` | `attribute set of string` | Allowed users and their secrets. A secret is a 32 characters long hex string. |
